# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/), and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [Unreleased]

### Added

- Added inline XHTML support in markdown for embedding formatted content

## [v0.1.2] - 2026-06-26

### Added

- Added inline XHTML support in markdown for embedding formatted content

<!-- generated by releaseledger -->

## [v0.1.1] - 2026-06-22

### Added

- Added support for creating EPUBs from a directory of markdown files
- Added optional title page and table of contents generation

<!-- generated by releaseledger -->

## [v0.1.0] - 2026-06-22

### Added

- EPUB 3.0 compliant package generation with OPF, NCX, and navigation documents
- Initial release with EPUB builder, markdown-to-EPUB converter, EPUB rebuilder, and CLI
- Added API reference, CLI guide, getting-started guide, and markdown documentation
- Added example projects: markdown-essays, rebuild-translation, and xhtml-assembly

### Changed

- License changed from AGPL-3.0 to MIT
